hero.subtitle: Nyx listens to your system audio or microphone, transcribes speech in real time, and translates it — displayed as a floating overlay that never interrupts your screen.

features.title: Everything you need
features.subtitle: Powerful AI under the hood, dead-simple interface on top.

items.title: Subtitle Overlay
items.desc: Always-on-top transparent window, click-through — subtitles float over any app without interrupting you.

items.title: Multi-language STT
items.desc: Supports English, Japanese, Chinese, Korean, and more via Whisper AI.

items.title: Smart Translation
items.desc: Translate to Vietnamese or English. Three-layer context system keeps translations accurate and consistent.

items.title: System & Mic Audio
items.desc: Capture audio from any app (ScreenCaptureKit on macOS, WASAPI on Windows) or your microphone.

items.title: 3-Layer Context
items.desc: User hint + auto-glossary + bilingual rolling history — translation gets smarter over time.

items.title: Session Saver
items.desc: Automatically save your full subtitle session to a plain-text file after each use.

items.title: Customizable Overlay
items.desc: Adjust opacity, font size, position, and hotkeys to fit your workflow.

items.title: Cross-platform
items.desc: Runs natively on macOS (13+) and Windows.

demo.title: See Nyx in action
demo.subtitle: Real-time subtitles floating right over your screen.

pricing.title: Simple, no surprises
pricing.subtitle: Monthly subscription. Cancel anytime. Payment via QR code — key delivered instantly.
pricing.payment_note: Open the app → Account tab → choose a plan → scan QR to pay. Key activated automatically.

contact.title: Get in touch
contact.subtitle: Have questions? Reach out to us.
